meta.title: Air Force Basic Training Week One
meta.description:
In week one, your trainee will earnestly begin the training they need in order to become a professional Airman. Trainees will head into an in-processing center and be assigned to the flight that they will remain in for the duration of training.

Joining the military? Get Sandboxx to stay connected with friends and family before you ship for training. Download Sandboxx https://link.sandboxx.us/jsTLspZQ96
